findings.design_reference: FR-019/T020 verification-confidence and observability-resilience lenses; devops-operations lens and T034b/DRIFT-198-I001-001
findings.comment: HUMAN DECISION REQUIRED: stop the autonomous review/fix loop. Both prior blocking findings remain unresolved and no worktree-visible human deferral covers either. Get-ContinuousCoReviewRoundSpendClass still has no production call site (only three unit-test calls), so T020 remains falsely marked done without preflight gating, failed-invocation disposition persistence, provider-spend recording, or round consumption on the real failure path. Separately, changes.diff still changes bin/specrew*, install.sh, and two shell entrypoints from 100755 to 100644 despite the binding exec-bit restoration seam. A human must decide whether to require both fixes before proceeding or record an explicit worktree-visible approved deferral naming the issues and carried work.
